# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "3"

before_script:
  - export MR_ID="$(curl --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests?source_branch=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" | jq '.[0].id')"
  - export MR_TITLE="$(curl --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$MR_ID" | jq -r '.title')"
  - export MR_DESCRIPTION="$(curl --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$MR_ID" | jq -r '.description')"

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building with MR Title: $MR_TITLE and Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Perform real build process here"

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Testing with MR Title: $MR_TITLE and Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Perform real testing process here"

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying with MR Title: $MR_TITLE and Description: $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "Commit message: $CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE"
    - echo "Set deployment tag with $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Perform real deployment process here"
  only:
    - master
